underlined.summary: Underlined directories are not part of the main content, but contain additional materials such as drafts, scripts, humor, and obsolete content. You should skip these content when creating canon works.
underlined.dir: Drafts and work-in-progress materials that have not yet been finalized or incorporated into the main worldbuilding content.
Humorous and satirical content created for entertainment purposes, not to be treated as canon lore.
Scrapped content that has been replaced or removed from the current worldbuilding canon. Kept for archival reference only.
Experimental strategy game prototype based on the Rakia Verse world building, inspired by _Battle for Wesnoth_.
Kuiter is another fictional worldbuilding project that is not part of the main Rakia Verse canon. It contains its own lore, characters, and settings, and should be treated as a separate work.
